display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Read L1 Artifacts
Extract 35+ addresses
implementation addrs

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
BuildDeployConfig
Struct Formation
라인 120-180
L1 addresses
L2 chain ID
fork block

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
NewL2ImmutableConfig
라인 180-220
Build immutable values
per predeploy
constructor args

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
NewL2StorageConfig
라인 220-280
Initialize storage
slots per contract
L1 info, system params

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
BuildL2Genesis
라인 280-340
Generate genesis allocs
40+ predeployed accounts
code + storage + balance

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
PredeploySystemContracts
라인 340-360
Inject system contracts
into genesis
40+ predeploys

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
setupPredeploy Loop
라인 360-420
For each of 40+ contracts:
- Set code
- Set storage
- Set balance
- Record immutables

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
BytecodePatcher
라인 450-500
Inject constructor
arguments into bytecode
Immutable values
parameter encoding

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
PerformUpgradeTxs
라인 500-560
Execute upgrade
transactions
Initialize contracts
Set proxy implementations

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
BuildRollupConfig
라인 560-610
Construct RollupConfig
L2 genesis hash
L1 start block
system config params

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
ValidateGenesis
라인 610-660
Verify all accounts
Check bytecode
Validate storage
Ensure consistency

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Serialize to JSON
라인 660-700
Marshal to JSON
Compress if needed
Prepare output

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
File Output
라인 700-750
Write genesis.json
~20-100MB
Write rollup.json
~10KB
